page_description: Register managed Markdown SOPs that DS-APM alert rules can bind with sop_id and feed into SOP-grounded AI response strategy.
binding_section_description: Verify that an alert label resolves to an approved SOP document.
documents_section_description: Latest registered documents available to SOP binding preview.
edit_version_hint: Enter a new version. Saving automatically deprecates the previous version.
edit_version_same_error: Enter a version different from the previous one.
detail_runbooks_hint: Manage the runbooks (automated responses) bound to this SOP.
remediation_toggle_description: Allows execution of approved runbook remediation scripts across this entire org. This is the master kill switch to stop everything instantly in an emergency. (Admin only)
remediation_toggle_confirm_on: Enable auto-remediation execution for this entire org? Approved runbook scripts will actually run after operator approval.
remediation_toggle_confirm_off: Disable auto-remediation execution? No new remediation proposals will be created (in-flight ones are unaffected).
